summary: Frontend builds successfully with Next.js 16.2.2 (Turbopack), no TypeScript errors, no build warnings. Frontend lint passes cleanly with zero errors and zero warnings. Backend py_compile succeeds for main.py and ruff check reports all checks passed with zero issues. Build output consists of 2 static routes (/ and /_not-found). No heavy or unusual dependencies detected in package.json.

frontend_build.bundle_size_note: 2 static routes (/ and /_not-found). Next.js 16.2.2 with Turbopack. No pages exceeding size thresholds reported.
